title: potentilla × prostrata
intro: Potentilla × prostrata, also known as Creeping Cinquefoil, is a perennial herbaceous plant that is a hybrid of Potentilla reptans and Potentilla griffithii, characterized by its creeping stems and yellow flowers. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Potentilla × prostrata include reducing inflammation and improving wound healing, as well as exhibiting potential antidiabetic and antioxidant effects. The plant can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusion, and is often used in herbal medicine to support the immune system and promote overall well-being.
